detail.description: Will Benson singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Nick Loftin.

Will Benson singles on a line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.
Will Benson singles on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Spencer Steer to 2nd.
Will Benson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Will Benson hits a ground-rule double (1) on a fly ball down the left-field line.
Will Benson doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Jake Mangum.
Will Benson homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
